languages.text: "Установка качественных аугментов значительно повышает эффективность любой биологической жизнеформы".
"The installation of high-grade augmentations greatly increases the efficiency of any biological life form."
languages.original_text: "Установка качественных аугментов значительно повышает эффективность любой биологической жизнеформы".

traits.locale_text: "The installation of high-grade augmentations greatly increases the efficiency of any biological unit."
"The installation of high-grade augmentations greatly increases the efficiency of any biological unit."
"The installation of high-grade augmentations greatly increases the efficiency of any biological unit."

languages.text: 「高性能な増幅器の設置は、あらゆる生物の効率を大幅に向上させる」
languages.original_text: "The installation of high-grade augmentations greatly increases the efficiency of any biological unit."

traits.locale_text: 「高性能な増幅器の設置は、あらゆる生物の効率を大幅に向上させる」

languages.text: “安装高级植入物将极大提高任何生物生命体的效率。”
languages.original_text: "The installation of high-grade augmentations greatly increases the efficiency of any biological life form."

traits.locale_text: “安装高级植入物将极大提高任何生物生命体的效率。”

languages.text: « La pose d'augmentations de qualité supérieure améliore considérablement l'efficacité de toute entité biologique. »
languages.original_text: "The installation of high-grade augmentations greatly increases the efficiency of any biological life form."

traits.locale_text: « La pose d'augmentations de qualité supérieure améliore considérablement l'efficacité de toute entité biologique. »

languages.text: «La instalación de aumentos de alto nivel aumenta en gran medida la eficacia de toda forma de vida biológica».
languages.original_text: "The installation of high-grade augmentations greatly increases the efficiency of any biological life form."

traits.locale_text: «La instalación de aumentos de alto nivel aumenta en gran medida la eficacia de toda forma de vida biológica».

languages.text: "Yüksek dereceli ogmentasyonların kurulumu, herhangi bir biyolojik yaşam formunun verimliliğini büyük ölçüde artırır."
languages.original_text: "The installation of high-grade augmentations greatly increases the efficiency of any biological life form."

traits.locale_text: "Yüksek dereceli ogmentasyonların kurulumu, herhangi bir biyolojik yaşam formunun verimliliğini büyük ölçüde artırır."

languages.text: "Die Installation hochwertiger Augmentationen erhöht die Effizienz jeder biologischen Lebensform deutlich."
languages.original_text: "The installation of high-grade augmentations greatly increases the efficiency of any biological life form."

traits.locale_text: "Die Installation hochwertiger Augmentationen erhöht die Effizienz jeder biologischen Lebensform deutlich."
